vision_observation: Empty header_image block (Nature Communications logo decoration area). Color: gray/light. Content: empty (logo image, no text).
discrepancy: mild — empty header_image should be noise, not unknown_structural
note: Pure decoration element; role assignment has no practical downstream impact but conf=0.2 signals uncertainty

vision_observation: Merged text containing 'Published online: 17 March 2023' and author names 'Jianjian Huang, Xiaodie Zhang, Ruixue Liu, Yonghui Ding & Dongjie Guo'. Color: dark blue (authors/affiliation zone).
expected_role: authors (correct) but published-date is frontmatter_noise merged in
discrepancy: moderate — published date is frontmatter_noise that got concatenated into the authors block by raw OCR
note: Raw OCR merged distinct content items. The pipeline chooses 'authors' as best single role for the merged block, losing the frontmatter_noise boundary. This is a raw-text extraction issue from the source PDF/OCR, not a classification error per se.

vision_observation: Empty bbox at [429,454,1005,507] in the frontmatter zone between authors and 'Check for updates'. Likely location of affiliation text (1State Lab...). Color: likely transparent/missing overlay.
discrepancy: major — OCR text missing in a region that clearly contains content (the author affiliation block)
note: The affiliation text '1State Laboratory of Surface & Interface, Zhengzhou University...' appears on the page but OCR failed to extract it. This is a vision/OCR pipeline failure, not a classification issue. Compare with block p1:14 which does have the footnote text.
